creator: m.muenz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206217
updated patch to make diff clearer

Updated the patch to make it more readable compared to old pkg-plist, removed SNMP options from Makefile since not used anymore.

poudriere replaces cacti to %%CACTIUSER%% for db-sections (which was not on 1.2.3) but it doesn't do this for some files (which was in 1.2.3). I don't understand the logic here since it should be PORTNAME as those file will never be renamed when also someone decides it should run as another user.

I'm still new to ports building so bear with me if I ask stupid questions :)
